business_rules.name: Customer Search: Multi-Field Partial Match
business_rules.description: A customer record matches the search if ANY of the following conditions is true (OR logic): last name contains search term (case-insensitive), first name contains search term (case-insensitive), ZIP equals search term (exact), city contains search term (case-insensitive), street contains search term (case-insensitive), house number contains search term (case-insensitive).
business_rules.logic: OR across 6 fields, case-insensitive substring match except ZIP (exact)

business_rules.name: WebSocket Message Routing by Target
business_rules.description: Incoming WebSocket JSON messages contain a 'target' field. If target='textarea', the content string is placed in the textArea. If target='textfield', content is deserialized as a SearchResult and all 10 Swing form fields are populated.

business_rules.name: Zahlungsempfänger Selection Required Before Transfer
business_rules.description: When 'Nach ALLEGRO übernehmen' is clicked, the selected Zahlungsempfänger (payment recipient) replaces the full zahlungsempfaenger array on the outgoing object. If no Zahlungsempfänger is selected, an empty string is sent.

business_rules.name: Gender Default: Female
business_rules.description: On form initialization and after event reception, the gender radio button defaults to 'Weiblich' (female). Male and Diverse are deselected.

business_rules.name: Form Clear on Event Receipt
business_rules.description: When the EventEmitter fires (after successful HTTP POST), all form text fields are cleared and gender resets to female. The response body is displayed in the textArea.

business_rules.name: All Fields Submitted on Action
business_rules.description: Clicking 'Anordnen' sends ALL 13 model properties to the backend HTTP POST, regardless of which fields are filled. Empty fields are submitted as 'null' strings.

business_rules.name: WebSocket Broadcast to All Clients
business_rules.description: The Node.js server relays every received message verbatim to ALL connected clients, including the sender. No filtering, targeting, or transformation occurs at the server level.

business_rules.name: Textarea Watch Auto-Sends
business_rules.description: Any change to the Vue textarea component's v-model automatically triggers sendMessage(val, 'textarea'), broadcasting the new textarea content to all WebSocket clients.

business_rules.name: Real-Time Two-Way Model Binding in Presenter
business_rules.description: Every keystroke in any Swing text field is immediately reflected in the model via DocumentListener (insertUpdate, removeUpdate). Radio button changes are reflected via ChangeListener. No explicit 'save' step is needed.

business_rules.name: Payment Data Validity: IBAN + BIC + Valid-From
business_rules.description: Each customer may have multiple Zahlungsempfänger (payment recipients). Each entry must have IBAN, BIC, and valid_from date. The valid_until field exists but is always empty in mock data.
